title: Kamaru Usman Eyes Sean Strickland or Islam Makhachev After UFC Oklahoma City Win
body:
In a bold statement, former welterweight champion Kamaru Usman has expressed his unwavering confidence in earning a title shot against either Sean Strickland or Islam Makhachev, should he emerge victorious in the upcoming UFC Oklahoma City headliner. Usman, who is set to face recent middleweight champion Dricus du Plessis, believes that a win in this highly anticipated bout will undoubtedly secure his position as a top contender for a UFC title. With his sights firmly set on reclaiming his spot at the top, Usman is leaving no stone unturned in his pursuit of greatness.

Usman's assertion is not without merit, given his impressive track record in the UFC. As a former welterweight champion, he has consistently demonstrated his skills and prowess in the octagon, earning him a reputation as one of the most formidable fighters in the division. His upcoming bout against du Plessis, however, will be a significant test of his abilities, as the South African champion is known for his exceptional striking and grappling skills. A win against du Plessis would not only be a major upset but also a testament to Usman's enduring talent and dedication to the sport.

The prospect of a title shot against either Strickland or Makhachev is a tantalizing one for Usman, as both fighters are currently riding high on their respective careers. Strickland, in particular, has been on a tear, with a string of impressive victories that have catapulted him to the top of the middleweight division. A bout against Usman would be a fascinating clash of styles, pitting Strickland's aggressive striking against Usman's more measured approach. On the other hand, a showdown with Makhachev would be a highly anticipated encounter, given the Russian fighter's dominance in the lightweight division. Makhachev's exceptional grappling skills and formidable ground game would provide a stern test for Usman, who would need to be at the top of his game to emerge victorious.

The UFC Oklahoma City event is shaping up to be a pivotal moment in Usman's career, as a win would not only secure his position as a top contender but also provide a much-needed boost to his confidence. After a series of setbacks, including a loss to Leon Edwards, Usman is eager to prove himself once again and remind the world of his exceptional abilities. With his sights firmly set on a title shot, Usman is training harder than ever, driven by a fierce determination to reclaim his spot at the top of the UFC hierarchy.

As the fight approaches, the anticipation is building, with fans and pundits alike eager to see how Usman will fare against du Plessis. The outcome of this bout will have significant implications for the UFC landscape, as a win for Usman would set up a potentially explosive title fight against either Strickland or Makhachev. With the stakes higher than ever, Usman is ready to put everything on the line and prove himself once again as a force to be reckoned with in the UFC.

As the UFC Oklahoma City event draws near, all eyes will be on Kamaru Usman, as he seeks to make a statement and secure his position as a top contender for a UFC title. With his confidence at an all-time high, Usman is poised to make a major impact, and the world will be watching with bated breath to see how he fares against du Plessis. One thing is certain, however: a win for Usman would send shockwaves throughout the UFC, setting up a thrilling title fight that would be an absolute must-see for fans of the sport.
